leadText: This article is about the ingredient. For the Gym Leader whose Japanese name is Onion, see Allister. Onion (Japanese: たまねぎスライス Onion Slice) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This spicy veggie is indispensable to many sandwiches. It goes well with rich ingredients.
